message:
fix(fp-conformance): wire FixtureOperation::SeriesUnique + SeriesFactorize

The series_unique / series_factorize oracle handlers and their live
oracle tests were added in 2f326c9 but the FixtureOperation enum and
its exhaustive match arms never got the corresponding variants.
Result: all 6 live_oracle_series_{unique,factorize}_* tests failed at
fixture deserialization with "unknown variant `series_unique`".

This change adds:

- SeriesUnique and SeriesFactorize variants to FixtureOperation with
  serde rename (+ _default alias)
- operation_name() arms for both
- compat_contract_rows_for_operation row (alongside SeriesDuplicated /
  SeriesDropDuplicates)
- ResolvedExpected::Series resolution branches for both
- packet-runner dispatch arms in both run_packet and the
  diff_series-based runner — Series.unique() returns Vec<Scalar> so we
  rebuild a positional-int-indexed Series; Series.factorize() returns
  (codes, uniques) and we keep just the codes (which retains the
  original index labels) to match the oracle's expected_series payload

Conformance suite: 781→787 passed (the 6 unique/factorize tests now
green); 25→19 failed (no new failures, the remaining 19 are pre-
existing DISC-011/012/014 etc).

[bd-frankenpandas-czcbk]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
